Subject: Cutting your detention fees at the Memphis dock

Hi Sarah,

Saw your post about detention fees eating into Q2 margins. We had the same complaint from two other shippers on the I-40 corridor, so I looked up your lanes.

Lanewise tracks carrier dwell times by facility. For routes like your Memphis-to-Dallas run, we can flag which carriers actually turn around inside two hours, before you book them. One customer, a building-supplies distributor about your size, cut detention charges 30% in their first quarter just by switching two lanes.

Worth a 15-minute call? I can pull the dwell data for your top five lanes ahead of time so you can see whether the numbers are interesting before committing to anything.

Tom
